title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Bayer India Capital India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Radiologist at Bayer India Capital India
jsonLd.description:
Bayer India Capital India has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Nagpur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Bayer India Capital India:
Bayer India Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Nagpur, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bayer India Capital India!
